'''Duneeden''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Despite its proximity to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], few beings ever came to Duneeden. It was home to the [[Cascardi Mountains]], which was the location of a few private retreats.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
